parameters.name: quality
parameters.description:
Optional flag specifying the minimum signature quality required (SES, AES,
QES).

parameters.name: longTermValidation
parameters.description: Optional flag indicating whether the signature must be long-term valid.

parameters.name: legislation
parameters.description:
Optional flag specifying the legislation to comply with (WORLD, CH, EU,
CH_EU).

parameters.name: infos
parameters.description:
Optional flag to request additional information, such as validation, format,
or signer details.
